reviews.comment:
Siempre que viajo, paso a esta estación de servicios. Muy limpios baños, tienda bien surtida, buena atención.

(Translated by Google)
Whenever I travel, I stop at this service station. Very clean restrooms, well-stocked store, good service.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNEeDhpMXpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Servicio de paso, no se podía parar x ahí..asique no bajé seguí camino..🤷‍♀️

Hoy 29/3 sigue en las mismas condiciones. Mas de media hora de espera para cargar combustible . 2 pobres playeros atendiendo un caudal de vehiculos. Verguenza

(Translated by Google)
Through service, I couldn't stop there... so I didn't get out, I just kept going...🤷‍♀️

Today, March 29th, it's still the same. More than half an hour wait to fill up. Two poor attendants serving a huge number of vehicles. Shameful.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURTdGNEYU5BEAE

reviews.comment:
Hermoso parque para estacionar detrás de la estación con fogones y juegos para niños 😀👍

(Translated by Google)
Beautiful park to park behind the station with fire pits and playground for children 😀👍

reviews.comment:
Impecable y muy buena atención

(Translated by Google)
Impeccable and very good service
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5cnVlUzJBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente opción para una parada técnica, con un parquecito trasero con mesitas y asientos, juegos para chicos, ideal para picar algo mientras estiras las piernas y disfrutas del paisaje
Los baños son un lujo.
La atención de todo el personal es realmente destacable.
100% recomendado.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent option for a pit stop, with a small park in the back with tables and chairs, a children's playground, ideal for grabbing a bite while stretching your legs and enjoying the scenery.
The restrooms are fantastic.
The service from all the staff is truly outstanding.
100% recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5cHBxYTdRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Me encanto super completa tenés lugar de descanso con parrillas mesas y bancos super copado el lugar y excelente la atención y limpieza !!!

(Translated by Google)
I loved it! It's super complete, with a rest area, grills, tables, and benches. The place is really cool, and the service and cleanliness are excellent!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7326459960207089806/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ5bVB1Y01BEAE
